changelog:
## Initial Release
- docs: comprehensive documentation update for v0.1.0 - fix: crash logs writer, profile path, LSPosed pause sync, UI polish - ci: use assembleDebug for Build APK step — avoid release signing requirement - fix: FileObserver API 29+ lint error — mask constructor guarded by SDK version check - feat: v0.1.0 feature batch — crash viewer, profile management, pause UI, accessibility service improvements - fix(a11y): add missing onInterrupt() and fix createWindowManager usage - feat: add AccessibilityService overlay trusted overlay mode for Android 12+ - chore: add xda_post.md to gitignore - chore(deps): bump org.jetbrains.compose from 1.11.0 to 1.11.1 - chore(deps): bump plugin.compose from 2.3.21 to 2.4.0 - chore(deps): bump multiplatform from 2.3.21 to 2.4.0 - ci(release): skip duplicate release guard when force_version=true - docs: rewrite pull request template to production quality - ci(release): fix YAML syntax - replace heredocs breaking block scalar indentation - ci(release): remove hardcoded testing phase banner from workflow - docs: fix inaccurate 'pressure' references - capacitive screens measure contact area, not force - docs(changelog): fill unreleased section with actual changes - chore: remove PROMOTION.md from tracking, add to gitignore - ci(release): add testing-phase banner and grouped changelog to release notes - docs: rewrite issue templates for better bug reports - docs: add user acquisition strategy guide - docs: add subpages for getting started, troubleshooting, FAQ, and advanced usage - docs: rewrite BUILD, CONTRIBUTING, and SECURITY guides to production quality - docs: rewrite README and CHANGELOG to production quality - chore: add FUNDING and stale issue management configs - ci: add assembleRelease build step with APK artifact upload - fix(module): update config path and add APK integrity check - fix(source): harden hook with lsposed_mode support and fix empty catch blocks - docs: rewrite contributing and security docs to production quality - docs: rewrite technical documentation to production quality

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 100 |

### 🆘 Support
- **Issues**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/issues
- **Security**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/security/advisories
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker#readme
